mapper.sql: id, equipment_id, action, from_room_id, to_room_id, storage_location, quantity, equipment_condition, residence_id, employee_id, operator_id, note, action_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO equipment_history (equipment_id, action, from_room_id, to_room_id, storage_location, quantity, equipment_condition, residence_id, employee_id, operator_id, note, action_at) VALUES (#{equipmentId}, #{action}, #{fromRoomId}, #{toRoomId}, #{storageLocation}, #{quantity}, #{equipmentCondition}, #{residenceId}, #{employeeId}, #{operatorId}, #{note}, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT FROM equipment_history WHERE equipment_id = #{equipmentId} ORDER BY action_at DESC
SELECT FROM equipment_history ORDER BY action_at DESC

SELECT FROM equipment_history
ORDER BY action_at DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT FROM equipment_history WHERE action = #{action} ORDER BY action_at DESC

SELECT eh.id, eh.equipment_id, eh.action, eh.from_room_id, eh.to_room_id, eh.storage_location, eh.quantity, eh.equipment_condition, eh.residence_id, eh.employee_id, eh.operator_id, eh.note, eh.action_at FROM equipment_history eh LEFT JOIN rooms r ON r.id = eh.to_room_id WHERE eh.action = 'storage' AND ( r.dormitory_id = #{dormitoryId} OR eh.storage_location = (SELECT name FROM dormitories WHERE id = #{dormitoryId}) ) ORDER BY eh.action_at DESC

SELECT eh.id, eh.equipment_id, eh.action, eh.storage_location, eh.residence_id, eh.note, eh.action_at, e.name AS equipment_name, r_f.name AS from_room_name, r_t.name AS to_room_name, emp.name AS employee_name, u.name AS operator_name FROM equipment_history eh INNER JOIN equipment e ON e.id = eh.equipment_id AND e.is_deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN rooms r_f ON r_f.id = eh.from_room_id AND r_f.is_deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN rooms r_t ON r_t.id = eh.to_room_id AND r_t.is_deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN employees emp ON emp.id = eh.employee_id AND emp.is_deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN users u ON u.id = eh.operator_id WHERE 1=1 AND eh.equipment_id = #{equipmentId} AND eh.action = #{action} ORDER BY eh.action_at DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT eh.id, eh.equipment_id, eh.residence_id, eh.storage_location, eh.to_room_id, eh.quantity, eh.equipment_condition, eh.employee_id, eh.note, e.name AS equipment_name, e.maker AS maker, e.category AS category, emp.name AS employee_name, COALESCE(r_d.name, r_v.name) AS room_name, COALESCE(d_d.name, d_v.name) AS dormitory_name FROM equipment_history eh INNER JOIN equipment e ON e.id = eh.equipment_id AND e.is_deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN employees emp ON emp.id = eh.employee_id AND emp.is_deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN rooms r_d ON r_d.id = COALESCE(eh.to_room_id, eh.from_room_id) AND r_d.is_deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN dormitories d_d ON d_d.id = r_d.dormitory_id AND d_d.is_deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN residences res ON res.id = eh.residence_id AND COALESCE(eh.to_room_id, eh.from_room_id) IS NULL AND res.is_deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN rooms r_v ON r_v.id = res.room_id AND r_v.is_deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN dormitories d_v ON d_v.id = r_v.dormitory_id AND d_v.is_deleted = 0 WHERE eh.action = 'storage'
AND e.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{name}, '%')
AND eh.storage_location LIKE CONCAT('%', #{location}, '%')
ORDER BY eh.action_at DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE equipment_history SET equipment_id = #{dto.equipmentId}, to_room_id = #{dto.roomId}, employee_id = #{dto.employeeId}, equipment_condition = #{dto.equipmentCondition}, storage_location = #{dto.storageLocation}, quantity = #{dto.quantity}, note = #{dto.remark} WHERE id = #{id}
